channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in HTML (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in HTML nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 VoltAgent/awesome-design-md (31321 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: VoltAgent

📝 Repository: VoltAgent/awesome-design-md

📄 Descrizione: Collection of DESIGN.md files that capture design systems from popular websites. Drop one into your project and let coding agents build matching UI.

⭐ Stelle: 31321

🍴 Forks: 3879

💻 Linguaggio: HTML

🏷️ Topics: awesome-list design-md design-system design-tokens figma google-stitch landing-page

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-31T16:37:01Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-08T04:32:13Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
